title: Bacon's Vanilla +
description: This pack adds lots of neat terrain generation, structure generation, and quality of life mods to the game that should generally spice up the world by mostly adding a fresh exploration feel to the game. Shader packs and resource packs are also included!
body:
This pack adds lots of new mods that improve terrain generation, structures, and quality of 
life while keeping the vanilla asthetic. Nothing should really stray too far from that "feel" of minecraft, but there will definetly be noticable changes!

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

**Here's a little list of stuff this modpack will add!**
- Lot's of new structures
- Improvements to old structures
- Cool semi-new (still vanilla styled) biomes
- Cool new terrain generation
- Plenty of cool shaders to try (some more or less just for fun)
- A couple good little resource packs to try
- Distant Horizons!
- Lots, and I mean lots, of quality of life mods (some you might not even notice right away!)
- Realatively smooth performance, crashes may happen though (there is a crash assistant though)
- A couple other small things and that's pretty much it!

-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Download the pack and give it a try if you think it sounds cool!
- **ALSO!!! THE 2.0 VERSION IS OUT, PLEASE DOWNLOAD THAT FIRST!!**
- (The other vesions kinda suck and have way more bugs and less optimization then the 2.0 version)
